manual_authority_reconciliation.reason: Chain falsely terminal (last_state=done) on a non-authoritative m3 completion record (pr_number=null, implementation milestone claiming done without a merged PR). The fixed engine reconciliation (PR #191 guard, squash f6d4845dc) cannot catch null-PR completion records: _reconcile_chain_from_ground_truth skips the PR-state authority check when pr_number is None (arnold_pipelines/megaplan/chain/__init__.py L4030), so the false 'done' persisted in every mode. Manual authority reconciliation applied per SD3 fallback (no owning command mutates this custody state).
manual_authority_reconciliation.engine_verified: origin/editible-install 667ac70b; guard f6d4845dc ancestor; offline recon proof leaves last_state=done (T4/T7)

stabilization_evidence.engine_limitation: arnold_pipelines/megaplan/chain/__init__.py L4030: the PR-state authority check runs only `if push_enabled and milestone.branch and pr_number is not None`. m3's pr_number is null, so the fixed engine reconciliation (PR #191 guard, f6d4845dc) cannot reject the non-authoritative m3 record in any mode. Manual authority reconciliation applied per SD3 fallback.
stabilization_evidence.live_marker: retry_counts[m3]=1 is the engine's documented live-marker mechanism (spec.py _normalize_advanced_completed_cursor L162-165/L190): a non-zero retry counter for the current milestone prevents the stale-marker rewrite that would collapse authority_divergence -> done.
stabilization_evidence.verification: Bug repro (empty retry_counts) confirmed authority_divergence collapses to done under load_chain_state; fix (retry_counts[m3]=1) confirmed authority_divergence survives load_chain_state, cursor stays 2, m3 rejected, file stable (no reversion/re-save). status snapshot: chain_complete=False, custody_mismatch=False.
